subcodes.title: Kitab al-Fihrist (Book of the index)
subcodes.first_line: Alif. Lám. Mím. Rá. This is the Book, a Remembrance from God concerning a wondrous servant, and verily it is the Book sent down from the presence of the Remnant of God, the True Imam [3.5s]... ...And this is a Book which was sent down  from God containing a directive from a wondrous servant. It is indeed a Book which hath come down from the Remnant of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. المر ذلک الکتاب ذکر من الله فی حکم عبد بدیع و انه للکتاب قد نزلت من لدن بقیة الله امام حق قدیم
subcodes.subjects: @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
